symptom: Selecting a licensed Openverse result submits a new remote image URL and the production patch fails closed.
rootCause: Client conversion failure fell back to result.url while update_image intentionally permits remote URLs only unchanged for reframing.
fix: Embed the bounded Openverse thumbnail and never submit a new remote URL fallback.

symptom: A consented production web-research run cannot start because no supported search provider is configured.
rootCause: Production Convex has no LINKUP, Brave, Serper, or Tavily API key.
fix: Configure one NodeSlide-owned provider key, then rerun snapshot, region, and element-to-region acceptance.

symptom: Five of nine configured model routes return no one-token assistant text in the production fleet probe.
rootCause: Provider or model failures returned errors or empty output; exact per-route receipt retained without response bodies.
fix: Triage each failed provider route without relabeling the completed audit as fleet health.

symptom: An unrelated fallback chart lets induced requested-chart removal report clean without repairing the requested chart.
rootCause: Critique checks only whether any chart primitive exists, not whether the exact requested series survived.
fix: Carry exact requested chart semantics through the fault and revision contract, then rerun the DEV-only camera journey.

symptom: An unrelated fallback chart lets induced requested-chart removal report clean without repairing the requested chart.
rootCause: Critique previously checked only whether any chart primitive existed.
fix: Exact requested chart labels and values now flow through the synthetic fault and revision contract; DEV camera reduced exact issues 1 to 0.

symptom: Selecting a licensed Openverse result submits a new remote image URL and the production patch fails closed.
rootCause: Client fallback violated the embedded-image contract and production CSP omitted the consented Openverse thumbnail endpoint.
fix: Bounded embedded raster path plus Openverse connect-src allowlist; production camera and editable PPTX passed.

symptom: The generated narrow formula box stacks KaTeX characters vertically and is not visually legible.
rootCause: A broad .ns-element-math span rule applies wrapping and font overrides to every nested KaTeX span, compounded by a narrow generated formula element.
fix: Scope fallback text styles away from KaTeX descendants and visually re-prove the generated narrow formula.

symptom: The generated narrow formula box stacks KaTeX characters vertically and is not visually legible.
rootCause: A broad .ns-element-math span rule applied fallback wrapping and font overrides to every nested KaTeX span.
fix: Scoped fallback styles to direct code children, preserved KaTeX fonts/no-wrap, and added inline-size-aware narrow math sizing.

symptom: A consented production web-research run could not start because no supported search provider was configured.
rootCause: Production Convex previously had no supported search-provider credential.
fix: Configured the authorized production Linkup credential, preserved snapshots through projection, retained citation provenance in deterministic fallback, and kept element-bound snapshot context in Evidence.

symptom: Selecting a licensed Openverse result submits a new remote image URL and the production patch fails closed.
rootCause: Fixed: the client embeds the bounded Openverse thumbnail and never submits a new remote URL fallback.
fix: Embedded licensed raster path is production-proved and regression-covered.

symptom: A consented production web-research run cannot start because no supported search provider is configured.
rootCause: Fixed: the production Convex deployment has a supported Linkup credential configured without exposing its value.
fix: Production consent, retained sources, proposal, acceptance, and element-bound snapshot are proved.

symptom: An unrelated fallback chart lets induced requested-chart removal report clean without repairing the requested chart.
rootCause: Fixed: exact requested chart semantics survive the fault and revision contract.
fix: The induced loss is repaired and the deterministic critique regression remains green.

symptom: Product CSS can override nested KaTeX spans and collapse narrow formulas.
rootCause: Fixed: product CSS no longer overrides nested KaTeX spans.
fix: Chromium geometry and accessibility receipt plus deterministic tests are green.

symptom: Four of eight offered model routes fail the bounded production fleet probe.
rootCause: Kimi now passes with explicit reasoning disable; GLM exhausts 64 tokens, while Fable and two Gemini routes return provider errors under the shared disable shape.
fix: Inspect sanitized upstream error classes and implement route-specific reasoning controls in a fresh bounded QA pass.

symptom: Geometry-clean multi-archetype decks can still repeat one editorial text skeleton and replace diagrams or evidence with prose.
rootCause: Acceptance counted archetype IDs instead of rendered pixels, valid provider slides silently inherited fallback artifacts by position, and the creation schema had no typed diagram primitive or deck-rhythm gate.
fix: K1 implemented structured editable diagrams, honest provider normalization, and visual-rhythm revision signals. K2-K5 remain open for StorySpec/artifact inventory, reference-bound plans, rendered candidate critique/repair, and exported-PPTX visual acceptance.

symptom: Four of eight offered model routes fail the bounded production fleet probe.
rootCause: Fixed: Fable and both Gemini routes require reasoning, while GLM requires a supported high effort and a larger bounded visible-output budget.
fix: Provider metadata, UI effort allowlists, and route-specific probe profiles now agree; the fresh production audit passed 8/8.

symptom: Geometry-clean multi-archetype decks can still repeat one editorial text skeleton and replace diagrams or evidence with prose.
rootCause: Fixed: server-owned StorySpec and design plans bind honest materials and four annotated references to every slide; three rendered geometry candidates are scored fail-closed and feed the bounded repair loop.
fix: K1-K5 completed with an editable diagram, material inventory, design plans, 21 candidate renders, seven-slide rhythm review, and individually inspected PPTX renders after one collision repair.
